component.name: electerm
component.summary: Terminal, SSH, SFTP, FTP, Telnet, Serial, RDP, VNC and Spice client

description.p: This is a community package of electerm, maintained independently.
electerm is a cross-platform terminal and remote-session client: SSH, SFTP, FTP, Telnet, serial port, RDP, VNC and Spice, with a tabbed UI, a built-in file manager, themes, sync and quick commands.

Permissions: by default this package keeps a tight sandbox — network and display only — which is enough for SSH/Telnet/RDP/VNC sessions and for transferring files chosen through the file portal. The app's own settings and imported keys live inside the sandbox. A few optional capabilities are not granted by default; enable the ones you need with "flatpak override":

ul.li: Reuse your existing host SSH keys/config: flatpak override --user --filesystem=~/.ssh:ro org.electerm.Electerm
Browse your whole home directory in the SFTP manager: flatpak override --user --filesystem=home org.electerm.Electerm
